nodes.description: A stylized line-art illustration of a husky dog's head viewed frontally, drawn with white/light line strokes on a transparent or light background, featuring distinctive blue eyes as the main color accent. Used as a brand mark/logo.

nodes.description: The husky head illustration functions as a brand logo mark, likely used in sidebar/branding contexts based on repository context.

nodes.label: Sidebar husky mark (UI placement)
nodes.description: Husky mark used in the application sidebar at 56px size per recent commit 'Bump sidebar husky mark from 48 to 56px'.

nodes.label: Husky face brand mark with piercing blue eyes
nodes.description: Frontal portrait illustration of a Siberian Husky's face rendered in a sketchy/line-art style with white/light gray fur strokes on a transparent background, featuring two striking cyan-blue eyes as the focal accent color, pointed triangular ears, defined facial markings, and a dark nose. Serves as a primary brand mark/mascot face for the Dash/Husky project.

nodes.label: Siberian Husky (dog breed)
nodes.description: Visual subject identified in the image: a Siberian Husky, recognizable by erect triangular ears, masked facial markings, and characteristic ice-blue eyes.

nodes.label: Cyan-blue eye accent
nodes.description: Distinctive cyan/ice-blue eyes are the sole saturated color element in an otherwise monochrome line-art mark; functions as the brand's signature accent color.

nodes.label: Sketchy line-art illustration style
nodes.description: Hand-drawn, sketch-like line work using thin white/gray strokes to depict fur texture; rendered for use on light or transparent backgrounds.

nodes.label: Brand mascot / logo mark
nodes.description: Inferred purpose: this image functions as a mascot/brand mark for the Dash (Husky) project, likely used in sidebar, splash, or marketing contexts alongside a wordmark.

nodes.label: Husky brand mark (Flask static) - stylized howling husky head silhouette in light gray
nodes.description: A minimalist line-art illustration of a husky's head in profile, depicted in a howling or upward-facing pose. Rendered in light gray/pale strokes on a white background with angular, geometric shapes forming the muzzle, ears, and mane. Served by the Flask app from the /static/img/ directory as the primary brand mark.

nodes.label: Stylized husky head logo with blue eyes
nodes.description: A minimalist line-art illustration of a Siberian husky's face, front-facing, rendered in light gray/white outline strokes on a transparent background. The husky's eyes are highlighted in a vivid blue color, making them the focal point. Features include pointed ears, a defined snout, nose, and facial fur markings characteristic of the breed. Appears designed as a brand mark or logo.

nodes.label: Logo / brand mark design
